vocabulary_list.meaning: A person who is protected and taught by a teacher.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: De leerling luistert goed naar de uitleg.

vocabulary_list.meaning: The person in charge of a school.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A person who looks after the school building.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: De conciërge opent elke ochtend de schooldeur.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A high-ranking teacher at a university.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: De hoogleraar geeft een interessant college.

vocabulary_list.meaning: The room where a group of students is taught.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Het klaslokaal is groot en heeft veel ramen.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A surface used by teachers for writing with chalk or markers.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: De docent schrijft de datum op het schoolbord.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A bag used by students to carry books.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Mijn rugzak is zwaar door alle boeken.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A number that shows how well a student did on a test.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Ik heb een goed cijfer voor mijn toets.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A document showing you have finished your studies.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Na vier jaar kreeg zij haar diploma.

vocabulary_list.meaning: To gain knowledge or a skill.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Ik leer elke dag nieuwe Nederlandse woorden.

vocabulary_list.meaning: To make something clear or easy to understand.

vocabulary_list.meaning: To keep information in your mind.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Het is moeilijk om alle regels te onthouden.

vocabulary_list.meaning: To not pass a test or examination.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Hij is helaas gezakt voor zijn rijexamen.

vocabulary_list.meaning: Very eager to do or achieve something.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: De gemotiveerde student studeert ook in het weekend.

vocabulary_list.meaning: Wanting to know or learn something.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Kinderen zijn vaak erg nieuwsgierig.

vocabulary_list.meaning: Not difficult; simple.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Deze oefening is gelukkig heel makkelijk.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A short time when you stop working or studying.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Tijdens de pauze eten we een boterham.

vocabulary_list.meaning: Extra help given to students with their schoolwork.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Mijn zoon gaat twee keer per week naar huiswerkbegeleiding.

vocabulary_list.meaning: The study of numbers, shapes, and patterns.

vocabulary_list.meaning: The study of past events.

vocabulary_list.meaning: The study of the world's surface, physical features, and climate.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Bij aardrijkskunde leren we over verschillende landen.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A school subject involving physical exercise and sports.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A book with blank pages for writing notes.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Ik schrijf de antwoorden in mijn schrift.

vocabulary_list.meaning: An instrument for writing or drawing with ink.

vocabulary_list.meaning: An instrument for writing or drawing, usually made of wood with graphite.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A small piece of rubber used to remove pencil marks.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A straight strip of wood or plastic used to measure or draw straight lines.

vocabulary_list.meaning: An electronic device used for mathematical calculations.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Tijdens het examen mag je een rekenmachine gebruiken.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A place where books and other materials are kept for reading or borrowing.

vocabulary_list.meaning: An outside area where students spend their breaks.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: De kinderen spelen tikkertje op het schoolplein.

vocabulary_list.meaning: To look at and understand written or printed words.

vocabulary_list.meaning: To mark letters or words on paper with a pen or pencil.

vocabulary_list.meaning: Of great value or significance.

vocabulary_list.meaning: Arousing curiosity or interest.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A high-level educational institution.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A school for professional or vocational training.

vocabulary_list.meaning: A large room for presentations and ceremonies.

vocabulary_list.meaning: The study of living organisms.

vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Natuurkunde vind ik een heel moeilijk vak.

vocabulary_list.meaning: To give finished work to a teacher.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: Je moet je huiswerk voor vrijdag inleveren.

vocabulary_list.meaning: To make something better or fix mistakes.
vocabulary_list.example_sentence: De leraar gaat mijn fouten verbeteren.

vocabulary_list.meaning: To get ready for something in the future.

vocabulary_list.meaning: To say or do something again.

vocabulary_list.meaning: Demanding that rules are followed exactly.
